Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; the old JDK 11 image does not provide the target runtime environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which uses apk instead of apt-get; using apt-get would fail at runtime.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource setup script to ensure compatibility with the Alpine environment and specific version control.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous NodeSource script and apt-get installation method are incompatible with the Alpine base image.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven by default.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the Java application, and the new base image lacks it.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or tools used in the build/runtime on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Missing C++ standard library headers/libraries can cause runtime failures for native components.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the container entrypoint to run the specific application JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to execute the application; the previous CMD was a placeholder/debug shell.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add steps to copy source code and build the application within the Docker image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application JAR must be built inside the container to ensure environment consistency.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app
RUN mvn -B -Pproduction -Ph2 -DskipTests -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17+; setting to 21 ensures the compiler targets the correct bytecode version for the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (WebFlux/MVC changes); using it causes compilation errors or runtime failures due to missing/changed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x, leading to dependency resolution conflicts or runtime classpath issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation-api dependency to resolve missing validation API classes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE 9+, but some legacy code or transitive dependencies might still expect javax.validation; explicit addition prevents NoClassDefFoundError if not provided by other starters.
